title: pseudognaphalium dysodes
intro: Pseudognaphalium dysodes, also known as coast ragwort or western ragwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antiviral and antifungal properties. Pseudognaphalium dysodes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to make capsules or ointments for topical application.
